stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto flies out to center fielder James Outman. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston walks. Willi Castro to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds out, third baseman Leo Jiménez to first baseman Kyle Stowers.

notableEvents.label: Wade Meckler pinch-hit · Lineout
notableEvents.detail: Wade Meckler lines out to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill walks.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley singles on a line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer. Victor Robles to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit · Fielders Choice
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Eli White reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Ezequiel Duran. Matt Olson to 3rd. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo grounds out, second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri pinch-hit · Hit By Pitch
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri hit by pitch. Denzer Guzman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon pinch-hit · Double
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon hits a ground-rule double (9) on a fly ball to center field.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds out to first baseman Andrés Chaparro.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa pinch-hit · Grounded Into DP
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa grounds into a double play, third baseman Bo Bichette to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Brett Baty. J.T. Realmuto out at 2nd. Edmundo Sosa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit · Home Run
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley homers (15) on a fly ball to right center field.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Kirk pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Kirk grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Cole Carrigg pinch-hit · Single
notableEvents.detail: Cole Carrigg singles on a line drive to center fielder Dane Myers. Jake McCarthy to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Trammell pinch-hit · Flyout
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Trammell flies out to shortstop Gunnar Henderson.

notableEvents.label: Josh Rojas pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Josh Rojas strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit · Pop Out
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn pops out to first baseman Kyle Stowers.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario grounds out, third baseman Max Muncy to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
